_doc: SPEC-117.6 heartbeat registry. kind: keepalive=must have live PID; calendar=last exit must be in allow_exit. freshness: file must be fresh per rule — 'trading_day'=mtime today when today is a NYSE trading day (monitor runs 17:30 ET, after all producers); 'daily_26h'=mtime within 26h regardless of trading day. path relative to ~/SPX_strat unless absolute. New jobs MUST be added here (heartbeat asserts registry covers all com.spxstrat.* labels it sees).

jobs.label: com.spxstrat.q041_collect
jobs.note: exit 1 = partial symbol errors; SPX/QQQ hard-fail already telegrams via SPEC-114

jobs.label: com.spxstrat.etrade_token_renew
jobs.note: exit 1 = token already expired at 23:30 (PM did not re-auth that day) — alert is correct

jobs.label: LOCAL:com.spxstrat.local_backup_pull
jobs.note: SPEC-117.1 L1 backup runs on the local machine at 05:00; it touches this marker on oldair after each successful pull

jobs.label: LOCAL:com.spxstrat.local_backup_pull.l2
jobs.note: F-1 follow-up: Sunday L2 iCloud archive touches this marker on success; an unmonitored backup branch is its own silent-failure class

jobs.label: com.spxstrat.q085_s2bps.bcd_shadow
jobs.note: SPEC-122 BCD real-quote shadow runs inside the q085 16:50 job; it touches this marker EVERY run (the shadow JSONL itself only grows on BCD signal days, so it cannot carry a freshness rule)
